1896060.name: Never Ending Dungeon
1896060.description:
Never Ending Dungeon is AI-powered software streamlining TTRPG game preparation, allowing Game Masters to generate ready-to-go adventures, complete with maps, NPCs, and treasure.

Never Ending Dungeon allows you to generate adventures containing various traps, NPCs, monsters, and treasures. You can play directly in Never Ending Dungeon. NED also allows you to play in the same room (good, old times!) with your friends using printed maps or to export to your favorite virtual tabletop software (like Foundry VTT or Roll20).

Everything you create is saved and available on the spot. You don't have to spend hours drawing maps or creating monsters or NPC stats! Forget carrying around huge sheets of map paper and folders of notes from your last session! From now on, all you need is Never Ending Dungeon. A huge and long campaign or a one-shot? It doesn't matter – our tool will help you create and visualize campaigns of any size!

GENERATE WHOLE ADVENTURE WITH ONE CLICK!

Never Ending Dungeon uses AI to create complete adventures with a map with just one click—a real-time-saver. Imagine getting your maps, enemies, and NPCs with stats and loot all setup and ready to go in no time.

CUSTOMIZE THE MAP

Personalize every adventure. With Never Ending Dungeon, you have the power to modify the map to suit your needs. Move monsters, rearrange traps, or reposition assets as you see fit.

STATS AND MORE

Every NPC and monster in Never Ending Dungeon is fully detailed with its own stats and background story, ready for action. Save time and play without the hassle of preparing all the details.

PLAY IN NEVER ENDING DUNGEON!

Run your session directly in Never Ending Dungeon and play with your friends. Embark on adventures or customize dungeons within the software, which includes a built-in dice roller for quick and easy rolls.

USE WITH YOUR FAVORITE VVT!

You can export the entire adventure (maps, monsters, NPCs, loot, items) to your favorite VVT. All the tiles will be ready, and NED will help you run and organize your session!

PLAY NED YOUR WAY!

Play in the same room with your friends using printed maps or display your adventure on a TV screen, controlling what your players see from your computer.
